section: Part E — Loan Request + Part F — Training + Part G — Eligibility
label: Part F, 2. Explanation
value: Applicant Scott Weeden brings non-farm business and management experience from prior professional roles. Applicant is relocating from Killeen, TX to establish a first-time vegetable farming operation in Campbell County, TN. Applicant is committed to producing eggplant, sweet corn, peppers, tomatoes, asparagus, and artichoke on the proposed property. Current mailing address (600 W Hallmark Ave, Apt 442, Killeen, TX 76541) is an apartment unit and is wholly unsuitable for the space, soil, and infrastructure requirements of the proposed farming operation. Property acquisition and relocation are contingent on loan approval.
